parameters.apprise_url_plus: sinch://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.service_plan_id_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Sinch destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise sinch:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Sinch XMS batches API JSON body and post it to sms.sinch.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"from":"${ customer_secrets.SINCH_SMS_FROM_PHONE }","to":["${ customer_secrets.SINCH_SMS_TO_PHONE }"],"body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Sinch XMS batches API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Sinch destinations, direct

api_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Sinch api token

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Sinch from phone

service_plan_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Sinch service plan id
